general: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page
electronics_notes: Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Electronics imagery should clearly communicate product form, compatibility, hardware details, ports, setup, included components, screen/device context, and real use environment.
For screen products, avoid promotional graphics or text on screen unless the source guide specifically calls for an interface or app view.
For accessories, show compatible device context where applicable.
For kits or sets, show all included components clearly.

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product or device straight-on on a pure white background as the primary product image.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white.

silo_front_display.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_display.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background as the primary image, with any screen content free of text or promotional graphics.
silo_front_display.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image with clean screen content, no text or promotional graphics.

silo_front_kit.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_kit.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with all primary components arranged when part of a kit.
silo_front_kit.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing all primary components when the product is a kit.

silo_front_case.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_case.guidance: Show the case straight-on on a pure white background, optionally displaying the item inside.
silo_front_case.recommendation: Add a straight-on case silo image on pure white, optionally showing the item inside.

silo_front_skin.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_skin.guidance: Show the product with applied skin straight-on on a pure white background to clearly display design coverage.
silo_front_skin.recommendation: Add a straight-on front image showing applied skin or wrap coverage clearly.

silo_alternate.label: Silo, Alternate
silo_alternate.guidance: Show the product at a three-quarter or side angle to display shape, depth, structure, design, or coverage.
silo_alternate.recommendation: Add an alternate-angle silo image showing shape, depth, structure, design, or coverage.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show a close-up of material, hardware, connectors, controls, termination points, physical elements, or design details.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a detail image showing key hardware, material, connector, control, or design details.

feature_detail.label: Feature Detail
feature_detail.guidance: Show a close-up detail of important hardware elements, controls, connection points, or physical components.
feature_detail.recommendation: Add a feature detail image highlighting important hardware, controls, connection points, or physical components.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the front of the retail packaging straight-on on a pure white background when applicable.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on front packaging image on pure white when retail-ready packaging applies.

silo_assortment.label: Silo, Assortment
silo_assortment.guidance: Show all included pieces on white in a clean, organized arrangement.
silo_assortment.recommendation: Add an assortment image showing all included pieces clearly on white.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in use in a realistic environment.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in realistic use.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.guidance: Display product dimensions using a clean graphic.
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing product size clearly.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight primary product features, compatibility, protection, storage, technical capabilities, construction, installation, material, or additional benefits using clean graphic callouts.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting key product features, compatibility, protection, storage, installation, material, or capabilities.

graphic_instructions.label: Graphic, Instructions
graphic_instructions.guidance: Display setup, installation, special features, or instructions using clean graphic treatment.
graphic_instructions.recommendation: Add an instructions or setup graphic when installation or use needs clarification.

silo_front_system.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_system.guidance: Show the complete system straight-on on a pure white background with included accessories when applicable.
silo_front_system.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing the complete system and included accessories when applicable.

silo_back_detail.label: Silo, Back Detail
silo_back_detail.guidance: Show the rear or ports view with connections and interfaces visible.
silo_back_detail.recommendation: Add a rear/ports detail image showing connections and interfaces clearly.

silo_front_software.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_software.guidance: Show software products straight-on on a pure white background with packaging visible when applicable.
silo_front_software.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing software packaging when applicable.

silo_front_gaming.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_gaming.guidance: Show gaming hardware straight-on on a pure white background with permanently attached components visible.
silo_front_gaming.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing gaming hardware with permanently attached components visible.

silo_front_optics.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_optics.guidance: Show optical devices or accessories straight-on on a pure white background with all included components when part of a set.
silo_front_optics.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing optical devices or accessories with included components when applicable.

silo_front_radio.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_radio.guidance: Show radio devices straight-on on a pure white background with permanently attached components visible.
silo_front_radio.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image showing radio devices with attached components visible.

graphic_interface.label: Graphic, Interface
graphic_interface.guidance: Show the interface, screen, or application clearly.
graphic_interface.recommendation: Add an interface graphic showing the software interface, screen, or app clearly.

graphic_warranty.label: Warranty Graphic
graphic_warranty.guidance: Display warranty information using a clean graphic.
graphic_warranty.recommendation: Add a clean warranty graphic when applicable.

graphic_whats_included.label: What's Included
graphic_whats_included.guidance: Show included items, components, or accessories in a clean, organized arrangement.
graphic_whats_included.recommendation: Add a what's-included image showing all included items, components, or accessories clearly.

lifestyle_aerial_flight.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_aerial_flight.guidance: Show the product in an active aerial or flight environment.
lifestyle_aerial_flight.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the drone or aerial imaging product in an active flight environment.

lifestyle_working_configuration.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_working_configuration.guidance: Show the product in working configuration with key contact or support points visible.
lifestyle_working_configuration.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in working configuration with contact or support points visible.

function_graphic.label: Function Graphic
function_graphic.guidance: Highlight the product's primary function such as holding, protecting, organizing, processing, or supporting materials.
function_graphic.recommendation: Add a function graphic showing the primary use, such as holding, protecting, organizing, processing, or supporting materials.

graphic_folded_deployed.label: Folded / Deployed View
graphic_folded_deployed.guidance: Show both folded and deployed states when the product changes form.
graphic_folded_deployed.recommendation: Add a folded/deployed view showing both states when the product changes form.

graphic_installed_view.label: Installed View
graphic_installed_view.guidance: Show the product mounted, installed, or in a full setup when the attached state, workflow, or placement is central.
graphic_installed_view.recommendation: Add an installed or mounted view when setup, attached state, workflow, or placement is central.

graphic_interior_organization.label: Interior Organization View
graphic_interior_organization.guidance: Show an interior view to highlight compartments, padding, or organization.
graphic_interior_organization.recommendation: Add an interior organization view showing compartments, padding, or organization when applicable.

graphic_worn_fit.label: Worn Fit View
graphic_worn_fit.guidance: Show the product worn to demonstrate fit, placement, or range of motion.
graphic_worn_fit.recommendation: Add a worn-fit view showing fit, placement, or range of motion when applicable.
